summary: Stores and emits a string control payload.
description: Use String for labels, symbolic control payloads, and text payloads that should move through the graph as data.
runtimeBehavior: in is the hot control.message.any inlet: string payloads update and emit, bang emits the stored string payload, and set ... updates silently. cold updates silently.

ports.description: Hot inlet: string payloads update and emit; bang emits the stored text payload; set ... updates silently.
Cold inlet: compatible string payloads update without emitting.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Store text as data
example.description: Use String when text should behave like a stored control payload, not a one-shot message.
